overall.description: First-person walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The character walks along sidewalks under elevated highways, crosses intersections, and passes by futuristic billboards and commercial buildings. Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 with vibrant neon lighting and dense urban atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway structure

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with metal railings spanning overhead
illuminated advertisement with red and blue panels displaying 'FEEL FREE'
tall buildings with bright neon signage and purple lighting accents
multi-lane road with futuristic vehicles passing by

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway in a cyberpunk city. Neon billboards and building signs illuminate the scene while traffic flows on the left. The environment is sheltered and artificially lit.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with neon-lit commercial buildings

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection with visible sky
crossing the street at intersection with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: navigating through intersection crosswalk among other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car stopped at traffic light

entered.detail: low-rise building with prominent neon signage and red lighting
marked pedestrian crossing with yellow stripes
steam rising from street vents in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into a bustling open intersection. The Mox building stands prominently on the right with neon lighting. Steam rises from street vents ahead as the character crosses the intersection with other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk under overpass with traffic barriers

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk separated from traffic by orange safety barriers

entered.detail: orange and white striped posts separating sidewalk from street
bright orange metal railings along sidewalk edge
opening ahead with bright lights and large digital displays

segments.scene_description: Walking under another section of elevated highway along a sidewalk protected by orange barriers. The area is less crowded with moderate traffic passing on the left. A brightly lit plaza is visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with large digital advertisements

events.description: pausing at crosswalk to let red van pass
resumes walking after vehicle clears the crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing plaza street, waiting for red van to pass before continuing

notable_agents.action: red delivery van driving through the plaza crossing with headlights on

entered.detail: massive illuminated screen displaying woman in purple jacket with beverage
restaurant entrance with 'EMBERS' signage above door
tiled pedestrian plaza with geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: Entering an open plaza dominated by a massive digital billboard showing a woman in a purple jacket. The character crosses the tiled plaza, pausing to let a red van pass. The Embers restaurant is visible on the left while the elevated highway recedes into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban underpass into a wide, neon-drenched city plaza. It begins along a covered sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway, where artificial lights and neon billboards illuminate the path beside flowing traffic. As the camera emerges from the walkway, the scene opens into a bustling intersection featuring the neon-lit Mox building and steam rising from street vents. The movement then shifts back under another section of the highway, passing orange barriers and moderate traffic before the environment expands once more. Finally, the camera enters a bright open plaza dominated by a massive digital billboard of a woman in a purple jacket, passing the Embers restaurant as the elevated highway recedes into the background.
